meta.title: Entertainment Market Map
meta.description: Spaces, sub-spaces, companies, and key problems across the entertainment industry.

spaces.name: Gaming & Interactive Entertainment
spaces.summary: Video games, esports, real-money gaming, and the platforms/tools that power them.

subSpaces.name: Mobile Game Studios
subSpaces.summary: Studios building casual, hyper-casual, and mid-core mobile titles.

subSpaces.name: PC / Console Game Studios
subSpaces.summary: Studios building premium PC and console titles.

subSpaces.name: Game Dev Platforms & Tools
subSpaces.summary: Engines, backend infra, LiveOps, analytics, and tooling for studios.

subSpaces.name: Esports
subSpaces.summary: Competitive gaming leagues, teams, tournament platforms, and orgs.

subSpaces.name: Real-Money Gaming (RMG)
subSpaces.summary: Fantasy sports, rummy, poker, and other skill/wagering-based gaming.

subSpaces.name: Gaming Marketplaces & Social
subSpaces.summary: Discovery, community, UGC marketplaces, and social layers around gaming.

subSpaces.name: Gaming Infrastructure & Hardware
subSpaces.summary: Cloud gaming, peripherals, and hardware for players and creators.

spaces.name: Film, TV & Streaming
spaces.summary: Production, distribution, and streaming of scripted and unscripted video content.

subSpaces.name: Studios & Production Houses
subSpaces.summary: Film and TV production companies, from majors to indie studios.

subSpaces.name: OTT / Streaming Platforms
subSpaces.summary: Subscription and ad-supported video streaming services.

subSpaces.name: Content Licensing & Distribution
subSpaces.summary: Syndication, rights management, and cross-border distribution.

subSpaces.name: Dubbing, Localization & Post-Production
subSpaces.summary: Post-production, VFX, dubbing/subtitling, and localization tech.

subSpaces.name: Regional & Vernacular Content
subSpaces.summary: Language- and region-specific film/TV content platforms and studios.

spaces.name: Music & Audio
spaces.summary: Music creation, distribution, streaming, and the broader audio entertainment stack.

subSpaces.name: Music Streaming Platforms
subSpaces.summary: On-demand and radio-style music streaming services.

subSpaces.name: Distribution & Rights Management
subSpaces.summary: Independent artist distribution, royalty and rights management tech.

subSpaces.name: Podcasting & Audio Originals
subSpaces.summary: Podcast hosting, discovery, and original audio content production.

subSpaces.name: Live Music & Ticketing
subSpaces.summary: Concerts, festivals, venues, and live-music ticketing platforms.

subSpaces.name: Music Creation & AI Tools
subSpaces.summary: DAWs, AI music generation, sampling, and production tools.

spaces.name: Live Events & Experiences
spaces.summary: In-person entertainment: events, ticketing, venues, and experiential formats.

subSpaces.name: Ticketing Platforms
subSpaces.summary: Primary and secondary ticketing marketplaces for events.

subSpaces.name: Event Discovery & Marketplaces
subSpaces.summary: Discovery and booking platforms for local/live experiences.

subSpaces.name: Venues & Experiential Formats
subSpaces.summary: Theme parks, immersive experiences, pop-ups, and venue-tech.

subSpaces.name: Sports Entertainment
subSpaces.summary: Leagues, fan engagement platforms, and sports-adjacent entertainment.

spaces.name: Creator Economy & Social Entertainment
spaces.summary: Platforms and tools that let creators build audiences and monetize content.

subSpaces.name: Short-Video & Social Platforms
subSpaces.summary: Short-form video, social feeds, and algorithmic content platforms.

subSpaces.name: Creator Monetization & Tools
subSpaces.summary: Tipping, subscriptions, brand deals, and creator business tooling.

subSpaces.name: Livestreaming Platforms
subSpaces.summary: Live video streaming for gaming, IRL, and social content.

subSpaces.name: Fan Communities & Fandom Platforms
subSpaces.summary: Fan clubs, communities, and fandom-specific engagement platforms.

subSpaces.name: Influencer Marketing Infra
subSpaces.summary: Discovery, campaign management, and measurement for creator marketing.

spaces.name: Publishing & Reading
spaces.summary: Books, comics, web-fiction, and digital reading/storytelling platforms.

subSpaces.name: E-books & Audiobooks
subSpaces.summary: Digital reading and audiobook platforms.

subSpaces.name: Web Fiction, Comics & Webtoons
subSpaces.summary: Serialized fiction, comics, and webtoon platforms.

subSpaces.name: Self-Publishing & Author Tools
subSpaces.summary: Tools for independent authors to publish and monetize.

spaces.name: AI-Generated & Synthetic Entertainment
spaces.summary: Emerging category of AI-native content creation and consumption.

subSpaces.name: AI Video & Animation Generation
subSpaces.summary: Text/image-to-video, animation, and synthetic media tools.

subSpaces.name: AI Companions & Interactive Characters
subSpaces.summary: AI characters, companions, and interactive narrative experiences.

subSpaces.name: AI Tools for Creators
subSpaces.summary: AI-assisted editing, scripting, VFX, and production tools.
